class.name: franka_joint_replay/JointImpedanceTrajectoryController
class.description: Joint-impedance controller (k(q_d-q) + d(dq_d-dq) + coriolis, torque-rate saturated) that follows a trajectory_msgs/JointTrajectory command. Low-rate waypoints are interpolated to the 1 kHz loop with quintic-spline segments (linear / cubic depending on whether velocities are supplied). Used to replay recorded joint trajectories.
